hotel_name: Residence Inn by Marriott Long Island Islip/Courthouse Complex

reviews.title: Old furniture and no hot water in bathroom no good internet connection
reviews.text:
Don’t recommend this hotel to anyone want good services 
Very bad staying

reviews.title: So much for a LOVING Valentines weekend!
reviews.positives: The rooms are nice and hotel is pet friendly!
reviews.negatives: This stay completely ruined my holiday weekend! The front desk staff was prejudiced. She gave me an issue with my check in on arrival. Stating I could not use a chime visa credit card, I then witnessed someone else use it! On top of her having an attitude she charged me the wrong amount. The amount I was charged did not reflect on my invoice. The manager could not explain how I was even charged that amount. The manger then stated that he would reach out to me within a few days. He did not and I reached out to them for him to be able to still tell me absolutely nothing! I will never stay at this property again!

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: After we arrived we discovered Central Islip has the largest population of MS 18 terrorist in the US. They are at war with the local police having announced they will assassinate them. We attempted to move to another Residence Inn in a better location but had to wait 20 minutes on hold for reservations and then were quoted an outrageous price. Never again!

reviews.title: Don't arrive before designated checkin time
reviews.positives: Everything except the customer service
reviews.negatives: The hotel and the amenities/services were great, per usual which is why I was a marriot member and chose this location.  The reason for this particular recommendation rating was  the checkin part. I did reserve the hotel on booking.com once completed I called the hotel to inform them of am earlier that expexcted arrival on my part and the coordinate any needed matter. Initially I expected to arrive at 2:00  am so I informed the very nice lady that answered the phone. She validated stay and said to me. "This should not be a problem.  You stay is on the 26th. I said yes but earlier that the normal checkin. She responded I see, well I have made notes just give us a call again before you arrive.  I said thanks and Cool.  Fast forward to the checkin. So when I arrive the gentleman Jose? Was there and I informed him that although i did try to call ahead of my arrive, life did not allow this. The gentleman began to say to me that I am they are at fill occupancy and there are no rooms available for me to stay. He went further thst he may be able to find one but he will need to do a "reconciliation " and "backup" which takes an unknown amount of time. Therefore I was asked to be "patient" with him while he does these things to see if a room can be found. I WAITED. and waited. After 30 minutes I asked him where are we at. He responded in a exasperated breath. I am working on it. It takes time. You have to be patient.  I'm doing you a favor.  At this point I was livid but without alternatives so I asked him how longs does it usually take to do a backup. No response.  I then asked how long did it take the last time this was done. His response was this is automated usually so he doesn't know. He repeated again I am doing you a favor it could take 10 minutes or 3 hours. The. He then said to me my attitude is not makiit easy for him. I had no attitude.

reviews.title: Comfy, clean, recently updated
reviews.text: It was a great stay! The staff was friendly and courteous. The rooms were beautiful and very clean. The location felt safe and nearby stores and restaurants with a car. Loved it

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: New rooms.
reviews.negatives: The tv did not work

reviews.title: Schöne Unterkunft
reviews.text: Das Hotel besticht mit seinen grossen, schön eingerichteten Zimmern. Das Frühstücksbuffet ist typisch amerikanisch und hat noch Luft nach oben. Das Hotel ist eher abgelegen und es gibt keine Restaurants in unmittelbarer Nähe.

reviews.title: Okay
reviews.positives: Nice clean great location
reviews.negatives: When I booked I sent a message to the property stating I would be arriving late approximately 2am. I prepaid the booking however upon arrival the clerk asked if I had cancelled my reservation I stated no I actually did a prepaid reservation so my room would get cancelled as I was arriving after midnight. Just not something I wanted to deal with at that hour

reviews.title: Manger should give complete details about your payment.
reviews.positives: Room
reviews.negatives: Not complete payment information from manger

reviews.title: The hotel staff were friendly though could have been more efficient.
reviews.positives: The breakfast was fine. It was convenient.
reviews.negatives: Their was trash in the hallways that was never cleaned up.

reviews.title: Had a good stay
reviews.positives: The kitchen
reviews.negatives: None

reviews.title: The breakfast was good .. the place was nice the workers very welcoming..
reviews.positives: The location and the comfort
reviews.negatives: I believe if you check in 7/8 hrs after your check in time you should feel ok to get an extra 1hr /2 to check out .. that should be   considered..

reviews.title: Goof location; accomodations needs work.
reviews.positives: Location and layout of room.
reviews.negatives: Hairdryer did not work. The shampoo and bodywash containers in the shower were empty. The bed was not very comfortable, the sheets were itchy, and the pillows were horrible.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Kitchenette and near soccer fields
reviews.negatives: Breakfast ends too early.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Convenient and clean
reviews.negatives: Slow hot water and TV malfunctioning.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Tasty breakfast- though I wish the food options were all available during the last 1/2 hour of breakfast - as many options were cleaned up already.  Breakfast ended at 9am too- which is too early and not relaxing to me.

Pool was out of order- which was really disappointing too.
reviews.negatives:
Longer breakfast hours please!
Pool open please!

reviews.title: Good for what we needed it for
reviews.positives: Room size
reviews.negatives: Couldn’t control temperature in room

reviews.title: Great overnight stay with comfortable accommodations
reviews.positives: The space of the room
reviews.negatives: Did not have in room bottled water and store ran out of water to purchase

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Good
reviews.negatives: Pool

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The room was spacious and comfortable. It was nice having our own kitchen. The swimming pool was generally very quiet, which was nice.
reviews.negatives: There's is nothing of interest on walking distance. You really need a car if you want to stay here.

reviews.title: My only complaint!
reviews.positives:
The Breakfast was great, alot of options.
Two bedroom suite was big and the beds were comfortable.
Lots of parking.
Proximity to exits were great as I was staying with a dog.
Staff was very friendly.
reviews.negatives: Only thing that was absolutely horrible in this great hotel is the sofa bed. I get the actual bed in a sofa bed will never be that comfortable but the sofa when the bed is not out is just about un sittable. It has to be changed I'm guessing in every suite cause it's the second time I've stayed here and it was the same thing, like I said the hotel is great except for these sofa beds. Please change them so that it is comfortable to sit and lounge in or at least add a couple bucket living room chairs so people who will be in the rooms a bit can be comfortable sitting in the living room area can watch TV. Again my only complaint. Thanks

reviews.title: it was good for the night .
reviews.positives: beds were very comfortable
reviews.negatives: was told free breakfast went until 10. went down at 9:45 and it was over apparently at 9:30. they didn’t make any adjustments to our rate for the inconvenience.

reviews.title: Very nice stay, but breakfast should end  later.
reviews.positives: Everyone was very friendly
reviews.negatives: Breakfast ends too early. Others I spoke to said the same thing. It should go to 10:00.

reviews.title: Great location, very convenient to family.
reviews.positives: Decent choices for the most part, but hrs open are short.
reviews.negatives:
Hours
Lack of food 30 min before closing time

reviews.title: Good, comfortable place to stay.
reviews.positives: The property is very clean and our room was spacious. The bed was comfortable. The breakfast was good.
reviews.negatives: The lighting is dim and some items in the room need updating. The towel wrack kept falling off. But, nevertheless I was happy with my stay here.

reviews.title: other than tv problem stay was excellent
reviews.positives: food and coffee was very good. room was very clean. staff was very personable and helpful
reviews.negatives: had trouble with tv. staff had to send a member up both days to get it to work.

reviews.title: Pleasant stay
reviews.positives: Clean  & comfortable room. Staff was very nice &  courteous.
reviews.negatives: TV only occasionally worked . Did report to staff . They sent someone up to try to fix the problem( was the remote).

reviews.title: Great spot, ample room, made to feel at hm. Very clean, recently remodeled
reviews.positives: Convenient, ample parking, good hot breakfast, very courteous staff, suite impeccably clean
reviews.negatives: Construction in lobby

reviews.title: Awesome 👌
reviews.positives: Everything about this stay was perfect. Exceptional all around.

reviews.title: Super friendly people and excellent facilities

Rooms very nice and quality beds

It was very nice

reviews.positives: Friendly, and clean

reviews.title: Very relaxing
reviews.positives: The breakfast was good. It had many choices to choose from. Good variety
reviews.negatives: Asked for a late checkout and it was denied😔 but I understand that the hotel was booked for the next day and they had to clean

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: Great stay as always when visiting family
reviews.positives: Have stayed here numerous times great location and staff very professional
reviews.negatives: Except for one night of noisy out of control party in room across the hall which was handled by hotel staff exceptionally well

reviews.title: Great! My granddaughter had a great time. Staff was amazing with her :)
reviews.positives: Location is great. The breakfast not so much. The waffles are premade with tons of sugar on them and in them. Bring back the waffle maker. It requires more cleaning yet it’s worth it! Not many  vegetarian options . Turkey sausage or bacon should be on menu daily and beef or pork if necessaryto accommodate ALL guests.
reviews.negatives: Breakfast. Hopefully the pool will be fixed during my next stay. It’s an inconvenience to walk over to the sister hotel in the winter. In the end my granddaughter enjoyed it.

reviews.title: Great stay for a family
reviews.positives: Clean safe fitness center

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Great staff and location
reviews.negatives: Add a hot tub for extra comfort.

reviews.title: A fun and memorable stay with my family…
reviews.positives: Breakfast was great, facilities are clean. Staff was very accommodating with our requests.
reviews.negatives: When I called earlier the time I checked in, I waited for a long time, to speak to the person regarding my reservation. I was on hold for probably 5 mins and that’s not cool….

reviews.title: My family and I will be back for our next NY vacation and look forward to booking the two bedroom s
reviews.positives: Breakfast was good. Wish for more of an selection.
reviews.negatives: There was nothing that I didn’t like, overall a great hotel and staff.

reviews.negatives: I felt like the basketball court is too close to the rooms because it kept me awake a lot.

reviews.title: Bien situé
reviews.positives: L’emplacement central sur Long Island. Le coin cuisine et les deux chambres séparées.
reviews.negatives: La décoration est vieillotte et la literie pas assez ferme à notre goût.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Wir waren mit unserem Zimmer nicht einverstanden und uns wurde am nächsten Tag ein Upgrade gegeben in ein Zimmer, in dem es ruhiger war. Das Fitnessstudio war für ein Hotel richtig prima.
reviews.negatives: Das Hotel ist sehr in die Jahre gekommen. Der Baustandard ist einfach. Wir haben im ersten Zimmer jeden Schritt der über uns wohnenden und leider sehr nachtaktiven Person gehört. Außerdem habe ich die sonst üblichen Badsachen wie Bodylotion vermisst. Darauf hatte ich mich ein bisschen verlassen.Das Frühstück ist sehr einfach und wenig gesund.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Riesengroßes Zimmer

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Personal war sehr freundlich
reviews.negatives: Frühstück war in Ordnung aber nicht vielfältig

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Hotel nuovo con i classici standard elevati della catena (trovati anche in altre strutture). Ambienti comuni ampi e ben arredati. Camera quadrupla con divano letto molto ampia ed accessoriata con angolo cottura perfettamente attrezzato.
Comodo parcheggio esterno gratuito. Ottima pulizia. In prossimità di centro con fast-food delle note catene. Zona molto tranquilla assai comoda per chi viaggia in Long Island e magari passa l'ultima giornata prima del  volo dal  JFK (che dista circa mezz'ora)
reviews.negatives: Nulla

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Moderno e pulito
reviews.negatives: Niente

reviews.title: תודות לYancy המקסימה והמקצועית מצוות הקבלה. הם לא מנקים את החדרים מספיק, לא מומלץ לסובלים מאלרגיות.
reviews.positives: תודה רבה ל-Yancy מצוות הקבלה שעשתה מאמצים גדולים להשיב לנו חבילה שאבדה, קיבלה אותנו בקבלת פנים נפלאה בצק אין ותמיד היתה שם עם חיוך ומקצועיות על מנת לסייע. במלון חדר כביסה נוח ומתוחזק, שצריך מגבות הם מביאים (אולי בגלל שהם יודעים שהחדר לא נוקה וסודר).
reviews.negatives: הם פשוט לא מנקים את החדרים. יש נקיון חלקי - אם בכלל. בחדר עם מטבח זה בעייתי. פעם אחת ניקו (לאחר סיוע מהקבלה שם ביקשנו שיבואו לנקות)  והשאירו פתק שמבקשים טיפ. פעם אחרת שכחנו להשאיר טיפ, שחזרנו לדירה הבגדים שלנו הושלכו על השידות והריצפה, הסדין סודר באופן מרושל, הכלים נשארו בכיור והאשפה לא פונתה בכלל. למחרת לא ניקו כלל ללא הסבר. המטבח מגעיל לא ניתן להשתמש שם בכלום, והכי גרוע ראינו שצוות הנקיון משתמש בתרסיס נגד חרקים, בחדר עם שטיח וחלונות סגורים - אולי בגלל זה סבלתי מפריחה במהלך השהות שלי שם, נוסף לאבק וכו מאד לא בריא לסובלים מאלרגיות. - שירות שממש לא תואם את המחיר שגובים עבור המלון, לעולם לא נחזור לשם.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives:
יומיים היינו צריכים לבקש שיחליפו את מיכל הסבון עד שמישהו בא להחליף. ביקשנו שהחדר ינוקה והדבר לא בוצע עד שביקשתי וחזרתי על בקשתי מספר פעמים.
הקפה בחדר האוכל היה לא חם.

reviews.title: Worst stay
reviews.positives: Nothing at all. They are house keeping is poor, there pool was close for the whole 11 days of my stay. They have given exact same breakfast everyday.
reviews.negatives: They couldn't give us the room we booked on our first night. They sent us to their other hotel for our 1st night of stay. Their housekeeping was really poor. Their pool was close for the whole 11 days of my stay. They have given the exact same breakfast every day.

Clean, pool,
Good breakfast
reviews.negatives: We ordered for 5 and the beds were set for 4
